'''âs-r-g''' ('''kasarag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:luff|luff]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-r-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:luff|luff]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-r-g
|-
! Lemma
| kasarag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisarag|thisarag]] || [[word:jisarag|jisarag]] || [[word:shisarag|shisarag]] || [[word:kisarag|kisarag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusarag|thuthusarag]] || [[word:jujusarag|jujusarag]] || [[word:shushusarag|shushusarag]] || [[word:kukusarag|kukusarag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusarag|thusarag]] || [[word:jusarag|jusarag]] || [[word:shusarag|shusarag]] || [[word:kusarag|kusarag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusarag|thusarag]] || [[word:jusarag|jusarag]] || [[word:shusarag|shusarag]] || [[word:kusarag|kusarag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesarag|thesarag]] || [[word:jesarag|jesarag]] || [[word:shesarag|shesarag]] || [[word:kesarag|kesarag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosarag|thothosarag]] || [[word:jojosarag|jojosarag]] || [[word:shoshosarag|shoshosarag]] || [[word:kokosarag|kokosarag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosarag|thosarag]] || [[word:josarag|josarag]] || [[word:shosarag|shosarag]] || [[word:kosarag|kosarag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosarag|thosarag]] || [[word:josarag|josarag]] || [[word:shosarag|shosarag]] || [[word:kosarag|kosarag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsarag|thĂŠsarag]] || [[word:jĂŠsarag|jĂŠsarag]] || [[word:shĂŠsarag|shĂŠsarag]] || [[word:kĂŠsarag|kĂŠsarag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasarag|thathasarag]] || [[word:jajasarag|jajasarag]] || [[word:shashasarag|shashasarag]] || [[word:kakasarag|kakasarag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasarag|thasarag]] || [[word:jasarag|jasarag]] || [[word:shasarag|shasarag]] || [[word:kasarag|kasarag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasarag|thasarag]] || [[word:jasarag|jasarag]] || [[word:shasarag|shasarag]] || [[word:kasarag|kasarag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasarag|shasarag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasarag|goshasarag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasarag|gokishasarag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasaragnĂŒ|shasaragnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasaragnknĂŒ|goshasaragnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasaragnĂŒ|gokishasaragnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasaragshĂ«|shasaragshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasaragnkshĂ«|goshasaragnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasaragshĂ«|gokishasaragshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasaragro|shasaragro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasaragnkro|goshasaragnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasaragro|gokishasaragro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasaragmu|shasaragmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasaragnkmu|goshasaragnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasaragmu|gokishasaragmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasaragsher|shasaragsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasaragnksher|goshasaragnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasaragsher|gokishasaragsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasaragng|shasaragng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasaragnkng|goshasaragnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasaragng|gokishasaragng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasaragya|shasaragya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasaragnkya|goshasaragnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasaragya|gokishasaragya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasaragyam|shasaragyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasaragnkyam|goshasaragnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasaragyam|gokishasaragyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasaragnĂŒshĂ«|shasaragnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasaragnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasaragnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasaragnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasaragnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasaragnĂŒro|shasaragnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasaragnknĂŒro|goshasaragnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasaragnĂŒro|gokishasaragnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasaragnĂŒmu|shasaragnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasaragnknĂŒmu|goshasaragnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasaragnĂŒmu|gokishasaragnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasaragshĂ«nĂŒ|shasaragshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasaragnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasaragnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasaragshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasaragshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasaragshĂ«ro|shasaragshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasaragnkshĂ«ro|goshasaragnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasaragshĂ«ro|gokishasaragshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasaragshĂ«mu|shasaragshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasaragnkshĂ«mu|goshasaragnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasaragshĂ«mu|gokishasaragshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasaragronĂŒ|shasaragronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasaragnkronĂŒ|goshasaragnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasaragronĂŒ|gokishasaragronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasaragroshĂ«|shasaragroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasaragnkroshĂ«|goshasaragnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasaragroshĂ«|gokishasaragroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasaragromu|shasaragromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasaragnkromu|goshasaragnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasaragromu|gokishasaragromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasaragmunĂŒ|shasaragmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasaragnkmunĂŒ|goshasaragnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasaragmunĂŒ|gokishasaragmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasaragmushĂ«|shasaragmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasaragnkmushĂ«|goshasaragnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasaragmushĂ«|gokishasaragmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasaragmuro|shasaragmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasaragnkmuro|goshasaragnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasaragmuro|gokishasaragmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
